title: Sequences and Series
description: Arithmetic and geometric sequences and series, sigma notation, and the sum to infinity of a convergent geometric series.
objectives: Find the nth term and any term of an arithmetic sequence
Find the sum of the first n terms of an arithmetic series
Find the nth term and any term of a geometric sequence
Find the sum of the first n terms of a geometric series
Determine when a geometric series converges and find its sum to infinity
Use sigma notation to write and evaluate sums of sequences

lessons.title: Sum to infinity and sigma notation
